channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Finding Heroes in Each Other (with Luis Carazo)
item.description:
Luis Carazo joins Brennan to talk about his D&D origins and the importance of session zero.

Duration: 1:39:03

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, luis carazo
